intel.tagline: San Diego's premier LGBTQ-owned restaurant and only urban oasis
intel.description: insideOUT is an elevated restaurant and lounge located in Hillcrest, San Diego, featuring California-Mediterranean inspired cuisine curated by Executive Chef Johnny Duran. The venue offers a unique indoor-outdoor dining experience with custom handcrafted tables, an open-air atrium, and striking architectural features. The restaurant is known for exceptional customer service, over-the-top themed experiences, and being a safe, inclusive space for all guests.
intel.location: 1642 University Avenue, Hillcrest, San Diego, CA 92103
intel.social_proof: Multiple positive Yelp reviews praising outstanding service, delicious food, beautiful atmosphere, and exceptional customer service. Customers highlight unique dining experiences and memorable occasions.
intel.key_cta: Make a reservation or book a private event
intel.missing: Business hours not listed, no online menu preview, no parking information, limited details about pricing, no chef bio or restaurant history/years established
intel.brand_vibe: Modern urban upscale LGBTQ-friendly welcoming elegant
intel.pain_point: No visible hours of operation makes it difficult for potential customers to plan visits or determine if the restaurant is currently open.
intel.chat_persona: Be warm, inclusive, and enthusiastic about curated experiences while professionally assisting with reservations, private events, and menu inquiries with emphasis on the unique atmosphere.
intel.cta_angle: Reserve a Table or Book a Private Event

email.subject_b: Guests can't find your hours or menu before visiting
email.subject_c: Turn curious browsers into seated guests at insideOUT
email.body:
Chef Johnny Duran's California-Mediterranean menu and that open-air atrium deserve to be seen before someone even walks through the door.

Right now, visitors to your site can't preview the menu, check hours, or know where to park — so you're losing reservations to friction.

We built you a free preview — a redesigned homepage and a live AI chat agent that answers questions about hours, parking, and helps guests book tables 24/7.

See it here: https://joshclifford.github.io/lvrg-previews/insideoutsd/index.html

Claim it free by booking a 15-min call: https://theresandiego.com/advertise/

Josh | LVRG Agency | lvrg.com | 619.361.7484
